title: Create Vinery
description: Create: Vinery is a useful compatibility layer between [Let's Do] Vinery and Create
body:
Create Vinery is a useful compatibility layer between [Let's Do] Vinery and the Create mod.

This mod adds multiple fluids to the game of pseudo fluids from Vinery, including grape juices of all types and apple juices.

It adds compaction recipes to turn grapes and apples into their respective juices

It adds filling recipes to turn the juices and bottles into their respective juice bottles

Also adds a few misc recipes like compaction recipes for Apple Mash and mixing recipes for Loam.
